info.title: Agricultural API
info.description: An ASP.Net Core Web API for managing agricultural data

post.summary: Authenticates a user and returns a JWT token if successful.

400.description: Returned when registration fails (e.g., username/email already exists).

get.summary: Retrieves all categories.

200.description: Returns the list of categories successfully.

400.description: Returned when an error occurs while fetching categories.

get.summary: Retrieves a category by its ID.

parameters.name: categoryId
parameters.description: The ID of the category.

404.description: Returned when the category does not exist.

400.description: Returned when the category could not be created.
Returned when the update fails.

delete.summary: Deletes a category by its ID.

parameters.name: categoryId
parameters.description: The ID of the category to delete.

400.description: Returned when deletion fails.

get.summary:
Retrieves all crops from the database.
Returns a list of crops with detailed information including category and owner.
Retrieves all crops for a specific user based on their OwnerId.

parameters.name: ownerId
parameters.description: The ID of the user whose crops are being retrieved.

404.description: Not Found

400.description: Bad Request

get.summary: Retrieves crops by their category ID.

parameters.name: categoryId
parameters.description: The ID of the category.

404.description: Not Found

400.description: Bad Request

get.summary: Retrieves crops by their name (partial or full match).

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the crop to search for.

404.description: Not Found

get.summary: Retrieves a crop by its unique identifier.

parameters.name: cropId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the crop.

400.description: Bad Request

404.description: Not Found

delete.summary: Deletes a crop from the database by its unique identifier.

parameters.name: cropId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the crop to be deleted.

400.description: Bad Request

404.description: Not Found

post.summary:
Creates a new crop and stores it in the database.
Returns a 201 Created response with the location of the newly created crop.
post.description:
Example request:
POST /api/crops
FormData:
- Name: "Tomato"
- CategoryId: 1
- OwnerId: 5
- ImagePath: file (optional)

400.description: Bad Request

put.summary:
Updates an existing crop in the database.
Returns a 200 OK response with the updated crop data.
put.description:
Example request:
PUT /api/crops
FormData:
- Id: 10
- Name: "Updated Tomato"
- CategoryId: 1
- OwnerId: 5
- ImagePath: file (optional)

400.description: Bad Request

get.summary: Retrieves all orders placed by a specific user.

200.description: List of user orders retrieved successfully.

500.description: Server error while fetching the user's orders.

404.description: Not Found

post.summary: Creates a new order for the user.

requestBody.description: Order details including items, user ID, and payment information.

400.description: Invalid input data or validation error.

500.description: Server error while processing the order.

get.summary: Retrieves all orders placed by a specific user.

200.description: List of user orders retrieved successfully.

500.description: Server error while fetching the user's orders.

get.summary: جلب جميع الإشعارات الخاصة بمستخدم معين.
Retrieves details of a specific order by its ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the order.

404.description: Order with the given ID not found.

500.description: Server error while retrieving the order.

patch.summary: Retrieves details of a specific order by its ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the order.

404.description: Order with the given ID not found.

500.description: Server error while retrieving the order.

404.description: Not Found

get.summary: Retrieves a payment by its ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The payment ID.

get.summary: Retrieves all payments associated with a specific order.

parameters.name: orderId
parameters.description: The order ID.

put.summary: Updates the status of an existing payment.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The payment ID.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: The new payment status (e.g., Paid, Pending, Failed).

parameters.name: transactionId
parameters.description: Optional transaction ID for external payment gateways.

get.summary: Retrieves all images for a specific product.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: The ID of the product.

404.description: No images found for the specified product.

post.summary: Uploads a single image for a product.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: The product ID.

400.description: Failed to upload image due to invalid data.

post.summary: Uploads multiple images for a product at once.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: The product ID.

400.description: Failed to upload images due to invalid data.

delete.summary: Deletes a specific image of a product.

parameters.name: imageId
parameters.description: The ID of the image to delete.

404.description: Image not found.

get.summary: Retrieves all products available in the system.
get.description:
This endpoint returns all products with their main images (if available).
It constructs full image URLs dynamically based on the current request host.

200.description: Returns the list of products successfully.

404.description: Returned when no products were found.

400.description: Bad Request

get.summary: Endpoint للزوار: جلب المنتجات بشكل Paginated مع تخزين مؤقت في المتصفح

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: رقم الصفحة المطلوبة (افتراضي = 1)

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: عدد المنتجات في كل صفحة (افتراضي = 20)

get.summary: Endpoint للمسؤول: جلب المنتجات بشكل Paginated بدون أي تخزين مؤقت

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: رقم الصفحة المطلوبة (افتراضي = 1)

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: عدد المنتجات في كل صفحة (افتراضي = 20)

get.summary: Retrieves all products created by a specific user.
get.description:
Use this endpoint to view all products uploaded by a specific user.
The endpoint also attaches full image URLs for display purposes.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The Number of page.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The Number of Elements that you want.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the user.

200.description: Returns the list of the user's products successfully.

400.description: Returned when the request parameters are invalid.

404.description: Returned when the user has no products.

get.summary: Provides dynamic search suggestions for product names based on user input.
get.description:
This endpoint is designed to enhance the user experience by offering real-time search suggestions
while the user types in the search box.  
The search is case-insensitive and limited to the top 10 matching product names.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The partial search term entered by the user (e.g., "tom" → "Tomato").

200.description: Returns a list of matching product names successfully.

400.description: Returned when the query string is null or empty.

404.description: Returned when no product suggestions are found.

post.summary: Adds a new product to the system.
post.description:
This endpoint allows you to add a new product, including uploading product images.  
The images should be provided using a multipart/form-data request.

201.description: Returned when the product is created successfully.

404.description: Not Found

400.description: Returned when the product creation fails due to validation or internal issues.

get.summary: Retrieves a product by its unique identifier (Id).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the product.

404.description: Returned when the product with the specified Id does not exist.

400.description: Returned when the request is invalid.

delete.summary: Deletes a product by its unique identifier.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the product to delete.

404.description: Returned when the product with the specified ID does not exist.

get.summary: Retrieves a product by its name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the product to search for.

404.description: Returned when no product with the specified name is found.

requestBody.description: The updated product data including images.

400.description: Returned when validation fails or update fails.

put.summary:
Update the status of a product (e.g., Approve, Reject, Pending).
Only admins can perform this action. 1- Pending 2-Approved 3- Rejected

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Product ID.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: New product status.

get.summary:
Retrieves the monthly financial and sales report for a specific farmer.
Optimized with SARGable queries and Covering Indexes at the database level.

parameters.name: farmerId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the farmer.

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: The target year for the report.

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: The target month for the report.

404.description: Not Found

400.description: Bad Request

get.summary:
Retrieves the top-performing farmers based on total revenue generated.
Accessible by Admin users to monitor platform growth.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of top farmers to retrieve (Default is 5).

400.description: Bad Request

get.summary:
Retrieves the Month-over-Month (MoM) sales growth analysis.
Uses SQL Window Functions (LAG) for high-performance trend analysis.

Retrieves products with low stock levels.
Can be filtered by FarmerId or used by Admin to see all alerts.

Provides a business intelligence (BI) report on sales distribution across different categories.
Useful for Admin to identify the most profitable product categories.

400.description: Bad Request

get.summary: Retrieves all users in the system.
get.description:
Requires authorization. Optionally, can restrict access to Admin roles using [Role("Admin")].
Each user's image URL is converted to a full URL.

400.description: Returned when an error occurs while fetching users.

get.summary: Retrieves a user by their unique identifier.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the user.

400.description: Returned when the user does not exist or another error occurs.
Bad Request
Bad Request
Returned when the update fails due to invalid data or other issues.

delete.summary: Deletes a user by their unique identifier.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The ID of the user to delete.

400.description: Returned when deletion fails due to invalid request.

404.description: Returned when the user does not exist.

patch.summary: Sets the status of a user account (activate or deactivate).
patch.description:
Only an Admin can perform this action. 
Use isActive as true to activate the account, false to deactivate.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The ID of the user whose account status will be updated.

parameters.name: isActive
parameters.description: The desired account status (true = active, false = inactive).

400.description: Bad Request

404.description: Not Found

Bearer.description: Enter 'Bearer' followed by your JWT token
